_comment: Profile P2 -- the A-GRA planning core (uci_mms_conversion_plan.md §5).

§6.1/§6.2, plus the UCI plan/approval/status types their closures pull
in automatically.  Validation tier (a) offline only -- no live
validator for this drop exists in-repo, and no compliance is claimed.

exist -- the drop carries MA_MissionPlanActivationStatus).  Field-table
reconciliation against the MA L1 Compliance Document §4 remains a
Phase-4 item.  Root names follow the top-level *element* names (the MT
suffix belongs to the element's type, not the element).  Expect the
